name: Baste and Bake Chicken (Inspired by Boston Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 2 whole chicken breasts, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together and warm them in a small pan or microwave to melt and thin the honey.
2. Arrange 4 chicken breast halves skin-side up in a 9-inch square baking dish sprayed with vegetable oil.
3. Bake uncovered at 400°F for about 35-40 minutes, basting pieces in the marinade every 8-10 minutes or until nicely browned.
4. Immediately upon removing from the oven, cover the dish with foil and let stand 10-15 minutes. Serves 4 without leftovers.
